title: I Price Clearly. I Price Fully.
subtitle: An affirmation for naming your full number without pre-emptive shrinking
excerpt: A short daily affirmation for the practice of pricing from value rather than from fear. For use before writing a quote, setting a rate, or entering any conversation where a number needs to be named.

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning as a daily grounding statement, and immediately before writing a quote, setting a rate, or entering a pricing conversation.

content.text: A daily affirmation for the pricing moment: the number said clearly, at its full amount, without the pre-emptive lowering that tends to happen before anyone has even responded.
I price clearly. I price fully. My number comes from what this is worth.

Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Say it again before writing a quote, naming a rate, or entering any conversation where a number needs to be stated. The affirmation is a reminder that the full price is allowed — before the wobble arrives and reduces it.
